headline: Is It Time To Reassess Medtronic (MDT) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: Wondering if Medtronic stock is offering good value at current levels, or if the recent moves are a warning sign? This overview sets you up to judge the price tag with clear valuation tools. The stock last closed at US$81.67, with a gain of 10.6% over the past week and 7.2% over the past month, even though the share price is still down 15.0% year to date and 3.6% over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on Medtronic's position as a large medical devices company and how investors are...
